_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: after 21 days of treatment, 90% of NF1-P53 tumors had increasing growth trends and a negligible kinome response to MEK inhibition. ERK was consistently inhibited by trametinib in these resistant tumors
details: After 21 days, 90% of NF1-P53 tumors had increasing growth trends and negligible kinome response despite consistent ERK inhibition
